hooks_predicted: For the first time ever, I am taking the fanciest class on one of China's high-speed trains
America's trains just cannot compare to China's
This train can go 350 kilometers per hour. That is insane.
When it's time to board the train, they will personally escort you to the train
I want to show you just how comfortable you can be
Let's see if it's a squatty potty or a western toilet, and if it's disgusting or if it's clean
You can scan this QR code and order stuff. Even KFC or McDonald's.
In the States, I think you can't get a dish like this at KFC
selling_points_predicted: China has the world's largest high-speed rail network
Trains reach incredibly high speeds of 350 km/h
Business class offers VIP treatment with priority boarding and personal escort
Business class includes complimentary beverages, snacks, and meals
Business class seats fully recline for comfortable sleeping
Order food delivery directly to your seat via QR code including KFC and McDonald's
Clean, modern facilities with western-style toilets and full amenities
Accessibility features including handicap toilets and low buttons for wheelchair users
Three class options to fit different budgets while maintaining comfort
More comfortable than airplanes even in economy (second class)
Spacious work tables especially in business class with leather covering
Hot water stations available for instant noodles or tea
Superior to American trains in punctuality and speed
